lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes. The interior is clean with light wear. It is mechanically sound and reliable.

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission are well-maintained and function reliably. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections but no major damage. The interior is clean with some visible signs of regular use.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs. The engine has a major oil leak and the transmission shifts roughly. Externally, there is widespread rust, several large dents on the passenger side, and the clear coat is peeling. The interior shows heavy wear with multiple tears in the seats. It is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a complete restoration project.

Ready for a rewarding challenge? This car is a fantastic candidate for a full restoration! It requires major mechanical and cosmetic attention, making it the ideal choice for a hobbyist or mechanic looking for their next big project. It's a great way to get a classic silhouette at a very accessible price point—perfect for someone ready to roll up their sleeves and get to work!

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, representing the pinnacle of its model's preservation. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish, showing no signs of chips, scratches, or imperfections. It has been meticulously stored in a climate-controlled garage and protected from the elements. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the leather upholstery is supple with no wear or creasing, and all dashboard surfaces and electronic components function perfectly. Mechanically, it is impeccable, featuring a full, documented service history from authorized

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical precision, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, reflects a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. This vehicle offers an uncompromising driving experience, delivered in a state that mirrors its original factory specifications.

Hey there! 👋 You have to see this beauty to believe it! It’s in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's ready for a new home where it'll be just as loved. It’s super clean, super smooth, and totally worry-free. Come take it for a spin, you’re going to fall in love! ✨
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Clean title. Inspection welcome.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that presents exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is pristine, featuring supple leather that still carries its original factory scent, with absolutely no signs of wear on the seat bolsters, steering wheel, or controls. Every electronic feature functions perfectly, and the mechanical performance is flawless, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history from the authorized dealer. With exceptionally low mileage and a chassis that has never seen inclement weather or salt, this car is a true collector-grade example. The sale includes all original manuals, two sets of keys, and the original window sticker. This is a total time capsule for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present an automotive example of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been curated to the highest standards of preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to excellence that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand nothing less than mechanical and aesthetic perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This listing represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe the condition of this beauty. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept in a climate-controlled garage and pampered like a member of the family. It looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single scratch or speck of dust to be found! If you're looking for perfection, this is the one. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!
This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of the S54 inline-six era, presented in true concours condition. The high-revving 3
2022 model. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history. Pristine interior and exterior. Inspection welcome.

This exceptional vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of pre-owned quality, maintained with obsessive care and precision since day one. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like finish, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes, and has been preserved under a professional ceramic coating that highlights the flawless bodywork. Inside, the cabin is a true time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and matte with no signs of bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and every technological feature operates with factory-level responsiveness. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been serviced exclusively at certified intervals with a comprehensive, documented history available for review. Always garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, this vehicle offers the look, feel, and performance of a brand-new car straight from the showroom floor. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that satisfies the most discerning collector. This specimen remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a premier example of automotive excellence. Its condition is absolute, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a meticulous ownership history and uncompromising care. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, demonstrates a level of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. This is an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning driver who demands perfection.

Hey there! 👋 You’ve got to see this absolute beauty! It’s in pristine, showroom condition and has been pampered its whole life. It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new, this is definitely the one for you! Feel free to reach out—I’d love to show it to you!

Offering a concourse-level example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 naturally aspirated inline-six. This specimen boasts a flawless double VANOS system and individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. The chassis remains structurally superior with zero subframe fatigue, while the limited-slip differential provides optimal torque vectoring. Every bushing, seal, and fluid is up to date, ensuring the high-revving 8,000 RPM redline is met with mechanical perfection. Original factory paint with zero swirl marks, complemented by a pristine interior. A rare, turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
2022 model. Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Full service history.

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, preserved in a state that can only be described as showroom-fresh. Every inch of the deep, metallic exterior paint retains its original factory luster, free from any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. It has been exclusively garage-kept and hand-washed under my meticulous care. Inside, the premium leather interior remains supple and fragrant, with no signs of wear on the bolsters or creasing in the seats; even the factory protective films remain on several trim pieces. All electronic components, climate controls, and driver-assist features function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full-service history at certified dealerships and a recently completed major preventative maintenance interval. The engine bay is concours-level clean, and the undercarriage shows no signs of exposure to harsh elements. With brand-new performance tires and a smooth, responsive drive that mirrors its first day on the road, this is a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning enthusiast to own a truly pristine example.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. An uncompromising choice for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an investment-grade acquisition.

Presenting an exceptional specimen maintained to the highest possible standards. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that is virtually indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting benchmarks for performance and reliability. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without compromise, this motorcar represents a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless example of automotive engineering.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute dream of a car, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been pampered since day one—always garaged, kept spotless, and treated with so much love. It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person! If you’re looking for something that’s been perfectly cared for and is ready for its next adventure, this is the one. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. This example boasts a structurally reinforced subframe and a comprehensive Double-VANOS overhaul, ensuring peak variable valve timing performance. The suspension geometry remains factory-precise, complemented by a torque-sensing M-differential and ventilated cross-drilled rotors. With zero mechanical lash and an immaculate undercarriage, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated longitudinal engineering. A turn-key masterpiece for the serious driver.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No defects.

This exceptional vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and all technology interfaces function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is perfect, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history and incredibly low mileage. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. Included are all original keys, manuals, and a custom car cover. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly immaculate example of this model.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an impeccable interior and a flawless mechanical profile. Meticulously preserved and free of any aesthetic or functional defects, it offers a peerless driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast.
